images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a breathtakingly beautiful, youthful Japanese idol‑style model, 20‑22 years old, with flawless yet natural skin showing delicate pores and fine vellus hair, large expressive eyes that sparkle with mischievous energy, a cute yet seductive face framed by straight, silky black hair. She stands in a sleek, modern bathroom filled with soft steam that rises from a rain‑slicked window, golden‑hour sunlight spilling in and washing the scene in warm, bright glow. The model wears a tight‑fitting, ivory white blazer left unbuttoned to reveal a sheer silk camisole beneath, paired with a high‑waisted, figure‑hugging pencil skirt that clings to her hips and thighs, its thin fabric lightly tracing the curve of her legs. She playfully sticks out her tongue, a cheeky grin breaking across her lips, while a single translucent umbrella leans against the marble countertop as if just set down after a rainy stroll. The background is a creamy bokeh of city lights and rain‑drops on glass, depth of field shallow, shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, ray‑tracing and global illumination adding hyper‑real light bounce, all finished with a bleach‑bypass color grade that boosts contrast and reduces saturation for that crisp, high‑energy editorial look.8k photo, Large breasts
